debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
⊢ ∃ C, ∃ (_ : Convex ℝ C), ∃ x y, ∀ (i : Fin n → ℕ) (s : Set (Fin n → ℕ)), ∑ k, x k (i k) + y s ∈ C ↔ i ∈ s

failed_attempts:
by
  obtain ⟨C, hC, x, y, hxy⟩ := exists_convex_r3_vc_eq_infty
  let f : (Fin n → ℕ) ↪ ℕ := ⟨fun i ↦ ∑ k, 2 ^ (i k * n + k), sorry⟩
  refine ⟨(fun g : Fin (n + 2) → ℝ ↦ (g 0, g 1, g 2)) ⁻¹' C, hC.preimage (LinearMap.proj _),
    fun k m ↦ fun j ↦ if j = 0 then x (2 ^ (m * n + k)) 0 else if j = 1 then x (2 ^ (m * n + k)) 1
    else if j = 2 then x (2 ^ (m * n + k)) 2 else 0,
    fun s ↦ fun j ↦ if j < 3 then y (f '' s) j else 0, ?_⟩
  sorry

by
  obtain ⟨C, hC, x, y, h⟩ := exists_convex_r3_vc_eq_infty
  obtain ⟨f, hf⟩ := Countable.exists_injective (Fin n → ℕ)
  let f' : (Fin n → ℕ) → ℕ := f
  use fun v ↦ v ∘ (⟨·, by omega⟩ : Fin 3 → Fin (n + 2)) ∈ C
  use hC.elementwise_const (fun i ↦ (⟨i, by omega⟩ : Fin (n + 2)))
  use fun k m j ↦ if j = 0 then x (f' (fun _ ↦ m)) 0 else 0
  use fun s j ↦ if j = 0 then y (f' '' s) 0 else 0
  sorry

by
  obtain ⟨C, hC, x, y, hxy⟩ := exists_convex_r3_vc_eq_infty
  obtain ⟨f, hf⟩ : ∃ f : (Fin n → ℕ) ↪ ℕ, True := ⟨(Finite.equivInfinite (Fin n → ℕ)).toEmbedding, ⟨⟩⟩
  refine ⟨{z | ![z 0, z 1, z 2] ∈ (fun v => ![v 0, v 1, v 2]) ⁻¹' C}, hC.preimage (LinearMap.proj 0 : (Fin 3 → ℝ) →ₗ[ℝ] ℝ).sum.sorry,
    fun k j => fun m => if m = 0 then (x (f (fun _ => j)) 0) else 0,
    fun s => fun m => if m = 0 then (y (f '' s) 0) else 0, sorry⟩
  sorry

by
  let f : (Fin n → ℕ) → (Fin (n + 2) → ℝ) := fun i j =>
    if h : j < n then (3 : ℝ) ^ (-(i (j.cast h) : ℝ)) else 0
  let g : Set (Fin n → ℕ) → (Fin (n + 2) → ℝ) := fun s j =>
    let a := (Classical.choose (Cardinal.eq_real.2 (by
      simp only [Cardinal.mk_set, Cardinal.mk_pi, Cardinal.mk_nat, Cardinal.lift_aleph0,
        Cardinal.power_aleph0, Cardinal.lift_id])).some_spec.2) s
    if j.val = n then a else if j.val = n + 1 then a ^ 2 else 0
  let X := Set.range (fun (p : {p : (Fin n → ℕ) × Set (Fin n → ℕ) // p.1 ∈ p.2}) => f p.1.1 + g p.1.2)
  refine ⟨convexHull ℝ X, convex_convexHull ℝ X, fun k m j => f (fun _ => m) j, g, fun i s => ?_⟩
  sorry

by
  obtain ⟨C, hC, x, y, hxy⟩ := exists_convex_r3_vc_eq_infty
  let f : (Fin n → ℕ) ≃ ℕ := Countable.equivIndices _
  refine ⟨(fun v ↦ !![v 0, v 1, v 2]) ⁻¹' C, hC.affine_preimage (LinearMap.proj 0),
    fun k m ↦ if k = 0 then (fun j ↦ if j < 3 then x (f (fun _ ↦ m)) j else 0) else 0,
    fun s ↦ (fun j ↦ if j < 3 then y (f '' s) j else 0), fun i s ↦ ?_⟩
  sorry

by
  obtain ⟨C, hC, x, y, h⟩ := exists_convex_r3_vc_eq_infty
  refine ⟨(fun f ↦ (fun i : Fin 3 ↦ f (i.castLE (by omega))) ∈ C),
    hC.preimage (LinearMap.proj (fun i ↦ i < 3)),
    (fun k j i ↦ if k = 0 then if hi : i < 3 then x j ⟨i, hi⟩ else 0 else 0),
    (fun s i ↦ if hi : i < 3 then y {j | ∃ f ∈ s, f 0 = j ∧ ∀ k > 0, f k = 0} ⟨i, hi⟩ else 0),
    fun i s ↦ by dsimp; rw [← h]; congr; simp; funext k; congr; cases k; rfl⟩

sorry sorry : (Fin n → ℕ) ≃ ℕ).surjective
  ⟨(fun v => (fun j => if j = 0 then v 0 else if j = 1 then v 1 else v (n + 1)) : (Fin (n + 2) → ℝ) → (Fin 3 → ℝ)) ⁻¹' C, hC.affine_preimage (LinearMap.proj 0), sorry, sorry, sorry⟩

by
  obtain ⟨C, hC, x₀, y₀, hxy₀⟩ := exists_convex_r3_vc_eq_infty
  let φ : (Fin n → ℕ) ≃ ℕ := Countable.equiv_nat (Fin n → ℕ)
  refine ⟨{v | (fun j : Fin 3 => v (Fin.castLE (by omega) j)) ∈ C}, hC.induced (LinearMap.proj (Fin.castLE (by omega))),
    λ k m j => if h : j < 3 then x₀ (φ (λ _ => m)) (Fin.cast (by omega) ⟨j, h⟩) / n else 0,
    λ s j => if h : j < 3 then y₀ (φ '' s) (Fin.cast (by omega) ⟨j, h⟩) else 0, λ i s => ?_⟩
  simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq, hxy₀, Set.mem_image, φ.injective.mem_setOf_iff, exists_eq_right]
  congr! 1
  ext j
  simp [Fin.sum_const, n.cast_nat_eq_type]

by
  obtain ⟨C, hC, x, y, h⟩ := exists_convex_r3_vc_eq_infty
  refine ⟨{z | ∃ w, (∀ i < n, z (i.castLE (by omega)) = 0) ∧ (∀ i < 3, w i = z (i.natCast.castLE (by omega))) ∧ w ∈ C}, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩

by
  obtain ⟨C, hC, x, y, hxy⟩ := exists_convex_r3_vc_eq_infty
  let f : (Fin n → ℕ) ≃ ℕ := Equiv.refl _
  refine ⟨(fun v ↦ fun i : Fin 3 ↦ v ⟨i, by omega⟩) ⁻¹' C, hC.preimage (LinearMap.proj 0 + LinearMap.proj 1 + LinearMap.proj 2),
    fun k m j ↦ if k = 0 ∧ j < 3 then x m ⟨j, by omega⟩ else 0,
    fun s j ↦ if j < 3 then y ((fun m ↦ fun k ↦ if k = 0 then m else 0) ⁻¹' s) ⟨j, by omega⟩ else 0, fun i s ↦ ?_⟩
  simp only [Set.mem_preimage]
  let s' : Set ℕ := (fun m ↦ fun k ↦ if k = 0 then m else 0) ⁻¹' s
  convert hxy (i 0) s' using 2
  · ext j; simp; split_ifs with h0; · subst h0; rfl; · rfl
  · ext j; simp; split_ifs with h0; · subst h0; rfl; · rfl

s l ↦ if h' : l < 3 then y (fun j ↦ s (fun k ↦ if k = 0 then j else 0)) ⟨l, h'⟩ else 0,
   by intro i s; simpa [Fin.sum_univ_succ, Fin.sum_univ_zero] using h (i 0) (fun j ↦ s (fun k ↦ if k = 0 then j else 0))⟩
